violations.description: HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): A hand drying device was noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory in the front service area. Dispenser noted not working on the east wall of main kitchen.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Microwave interior not properly maintained. Observed build up on interior surfaces of microwave interiors.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (2 pts): Cutting boards (both white and wood) in the food prep area noted not in good repair.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Fryer and stove exteriors pass through door reach in cooler/freezer door handles reachin cooler/freezers interiors and exteriors vent hood exteriors and pipes leading to hood computer monitors counters in food prep area and other equipment exteriors noted in need of cleaning.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Reachin cooler/freezer door gaskets noted not in good repair.

STORAGE/HANDLING CLEAN EQUIP & UTENSILS (1 pts): Cleaned and sanitized dishes noted being stored in such a way that the food or lip contact surfaces were being contaminated. Plates stored with food side up and in and area that food and other items can fall on and contaminate them.
PREMISES (1 pts): Mops and brooms not hung.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls in the kitchen noted in need of cleaning under and around in place equipment and areas of moisture.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): A hand drying device was noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory in the front service area. Towels out.

INSECT RODENT ANIMAL CONTROL (3 pts): Dead or trapped pests noted not being removed from the establishment in a timely manner. Fly traps (Sticky strips) full and not removed. Also CAN NOT use fly traps (Sticky strips) in food prep areas strips removed.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Reachin cooler/freezer door gaskets and soap and towel dispensers noted not in good repair.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Reach in cooler/freezer door handles reachin cooler/freezers interiors and exteriors vent hood exteriors and pipes leading to hood Ipads counters in food prep area and other equipment exteriors noted in need of cleaning.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls in the kitchen noted in need of cleaning under and around in place equipment.
LIGHTING (1 pts): The lights noted not shielded in dry food storage area. | LIGHTING (1 pts): Inadequate lighting was noted in the walk-in freezer.
